Function.Inference: The track starts with a short intro, followed by a |: repeat sign at the end of bar 2.
The main loop body begins after the |: and ends with a :| at bar 54.

Section.Inference: Short introductory phrase before the loop.
The first main theme is introduced with a lively melody.
A repetition of the main theme A, ending with an ascending transitional phrase.
A new, contrasting section with long sustained notes and descending chromatic movements.
A highly active section characterized by a repeated 16th-note ostinato pattern and a climactic resolution.
